mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO tb_ai_quota_daily_usage ( user_id, usage_date, used_count, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{usageDate}, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, usage_date, used_count, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_ai_quota_daily_usage WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND usage_date = #{usageDate} AND is_active = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ai_quota_daily_usage SET used_count = GREATEST(used_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND usage_date = #{usageDate} AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ai_quota_usage_log ( user_id, usage_date, feature_type, feature_ref_id, status, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{usageDate}, #{featureType}, #{featureRefId}, #{status}, 1, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ai_quota_usage_log SET status = 'RELEASED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_active = 1
